description:
Offered: Fall
In this advanced research methods course, students will explore the principles and procedures of single-subject research in classical and operant conditioning by conducting virtual behavior change experiments. Real-world applications will be considered. This course will be taken concurrently with or after completion of Psychology of Learning.
Prerequisite(s): PSY 2040 or PSY 2000 or by permission of instructor
Pre/Concurrent: PSY 3500
prerequisites: PSY 2040 or PSY 2000 or by permission of instructor
